title: delivery: redundant 202 check in success arm
description: delivery.rs:248: 'resp.status().is_success() || resp.status().as_u16() == 202' — is_success() covers 200-299 which includes 202, making the second condition unreachable. Clippy would flag this as a redundant condition. Fix: remove '|| resp.status().as_u16() == 202'.
